category_sources: source_facts.description says UNIX port of the Open Cubic Player; official repository describes a music visualizer/player for tracked music formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands ocp as Open Cubic Player; official project manual and repository use Open Cubic Player branding.
docs_sources: Official Open Cubic Player manual is hosted on cubic.org; current Unix fork README provides active project documentation.
repo_sources: MacPorts upstream and the active official Unix fork point to mywave82/opencubicplayer; source_facts.source-archive remains hosted on stian.cubic.org.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Open Cubic Player; source_facts.executables lists ocp variants; repository README describes tracked music formats and visual output.
